context_updates.response.implement:
## Summary

**Slice:** `home-miner-service:home-miner-service` ‚Äî slice 1 complete

### What Was Fixed

**Port mismatch bug:** The bootstrap script inherited `ZEND_BIND_PORT=18080` from the fabro harness environment, causing the daemon to bind to 18080 while the preflight curl commands targeted 8080. Fixed by hardcoding `BIND_PORT="8080"` in `scripts/bootstrap_home_miner.sh`.

### Artifacts Created

| Artifact | Status |
|----------|--------|
| `outputs/home-miner-service/implementation.md` | ‚úì Written |
| `outputs/home-miner-service/verification.md` | ‚úì Written |
| `outputs/home-miner-service/quality.md` | ‚úó Skipped (regenerated by Quality Gate) |
| `outputs/home-miner-service/integration.md` | ‚úì Written |
| `outputs/home-miner-service/promotion.md` | ‚úó Not written (Settle stage) |

### Health Surfaces Verified

- `GET /health` ‚Äî daemon health endpoint ‚úì
- `GET /status` ‚Äî miner snapshot with freshness ‚úì
- `POST /miner/start` ‚Äî start miner ‚úì
- `POST /miner/stop` ‚Äî stop miner ‚úì

### Key Design Notes

- **Canonical port 8080** ‚Äî hardcoded to ensure deterministic behavior regardless of inherited environment
- **Simulator pattern** ‚Äî daemon exposes same contract a real miner backend will use
- **Observe-only default capability** ‚Äî paired devices can observe but not control
- **Deferred to slice 2:** `/miner/set_mode`, LAN binding, auth adapter integration, Hermes integration

`‚òÖ Insight ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ`
The `${VAR:-default}` bash pattern caused the port mismatch. When a parent process exports `ZEND_BIND_PORT=18080`, child scripts inherit it even if they set a default. Hardcoding the value inside the script ensures determinism independent of environment inheritance ‚Äî a common source of production bugs.
